ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Full name of the course */,
  "section_code" TEXT /* Section code for the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor teaching the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Course description */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  "level" TEXT /* Course level (e.g., undergraduate, graduate) */,
  "campus" TEXT /* Campus where the course is offered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "chairperson" TEXT /* Name of the department chairperson */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the department office */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the department office */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the department office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the instructor (e.g., Professor, Lecturer) */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the instructor's office */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Instructor's area of specialization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course being enrolled in */,
  "student_type" TEXT /* Type of student (e.g., UGrad, Grad, NonDegree) */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled of this type */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester of the enrollment (e.g., Fall, Spring, Summer) */,
  "academic_year" TEXT /* Academic year of the enrollment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cross_registration" (
  "cross_reg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cross-registration record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course for cross-registration */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of cross-registered students */,
  "institute" TEXT /* Institute from which students are cross-registering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cross_reg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cross_registration_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visiting_students" (
  "vus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visiting student record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course for visiting students */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of visiting students */,
  "university" TEXT /* University from which students are visiting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visiting_students_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_enrollments" (
  "employee_enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee enrollment record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course for employee enrollment */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of employees enrolled */,
  "employee_type" TEXT /* Type of employee (e.g., full-time, part-time) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "withdrawals" (
  "withdrawal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each withdrawal record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course from which students withdrew */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of withdrawals for the course */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for withdrawal (e.g., financial, academic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("withdrawal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_withdrawals_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "total_enrollment" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled in the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester of the summary (e.g., Fall, Spring, Summer) */,
  "academic_year" TEXT /* Academic year of the summary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_summary_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., faculty, staff, student) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course being evaluated */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester of the evaluation (e.g., Fall, Spring, Summer) */,
  "academic_year" TEXT /* Academic year of the evaluation */,
  "overall_rating" TEXT /* Overall rating given to the course (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_evaluations_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course for which a recommendation is made */,
  "recommended_course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recommended course */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation (e.g., course content, instructor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_recommendations_recommended_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_recommendations_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course with a prerequisite */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the prerequisite course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_prerequisites_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
